description: A luminous sunset landscape over a wide body of water, presumably the Golden Horn strait. The enormous sun hangs low on the horizon, casting a brilliant golden-orange glow across the sky and water. Dark silhouetted pine trees stand on a hillside at the left foreground. Across the water, the faint skyline of a city with minarets and domes is visible through the haze. Small boats dot the glowing water. The palette transitions from deep warm oranges and golds near the sun to cooler tones at the edges.
